THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1166 HOWARD STREET, ASSOCIATES,L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANCIL, MODONNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1180 HOWARD ST., APT. 510, S.F., CA. $2,669.84 RENT, $206.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,876.14, STAYED UNTIL JAN-01-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, NO MORE STAY OF EXECUTION, AND WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, HOWEVER PLAINTIFF SHALL INSTRUCT THE S.F SHERIFF THAT EVICTION OF DEFENDANT FROM PREMISES IS NOT TO BE COMPLETED PRIOR TO 4/11/05. SEE SCANNED DOC.
